---
date: 2025-12-15
age_weeks: 4
milestone_tags:
  - motor-skills
  - feeding

mood: proud
raw_input: grabbed my finger at 2am, big smiles at the ceiling fan
---

His grip strength is wild. He latched onto my thumb during a bottle feeding
and I swear he was trying to pull the bottle closer himself. The pediatrician
said his motor development is tracking well.

He's also started kicking more deliberately during diaper changes. Not random
flailing, actual aimed kicks at my hand.

## Photos

### ~/photos/baby-grip.jpg

Baby in a white onesie on a nursing pillow, right hand wrapped tightly around
an adult's index finger. Eyes focused on the hand with a concentrated
expression. Bottle visible in the background on a side table.
